summary: Completed testing of Compliance System Audit fixes. 14/14 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified: Compliance Summary card shows correct Requirements Complete/Verified/Missing counts, Checklist tab shows requirement statuses correctly, no duplicate forms exist, forms and documents have requirement_id linking.

minor.issue: Inconsistent completion counts: /compliance shows 11/20 (55%) while /compliance-requirements shows 10/20 (50%). Caused by different training name matching logic - /compliance uses regex which matches 'Infection Control and Hygiene' to 'Infection Control', while /compliance-requirements uses exact name matching.

passed_tests: Backend: Compliance score calculated from requirement completion (not document count)
Backend: No duplicate forms exist for the same requirement
Backend: Forms have requirement_id linking them to requirements
Backend: Documents have requirement_id linking them to requirements
Backend: Compliance Summary has all required fields (total, completed, verified, missing, completion_percentage)
Backend: Checklist requirements have valid statuses (completed, in_progress, missing)
Backend: Import document endpoint updates existing forms instead of creating duplicates
Backend: cleanup-duplicates endpoint runs successfully
Backend: No duplicates after cleanup
Backend: Training requirements included in compliance calculation
Backend: Training completion updates compliance status
Backend: Employee completion_percentage field exists
Backend: All requirements have unique IDs
Frontend: Compliance Summary card shows Requirements Complete (10/20)
Frontend: Compliance Summary card shows Verified count (4/10)
Frontend: Compliance Summary card shows Missing Requirements (10)
Frontend: Checklist tab shows 'Mandatory Compliance Items' header
Frontend: Checklist tab shows requirement statuses (Complete, In Progress, Missing)
Frontend: Checklist tab shows 'Verify All' button
Frontend: Generate Forms dropdown shows 'Import Other Document' option
action_items: OPTIONAL: Standardize training name matching between /compliance and /compliance-requirements endpoints to ensure consistent completion counts
critical_code_review_comments: Training name matching inconsistency: /compliance uses regex matching while /compliance-requirements uses exact name matching. This causes different completion counts (55% vs 50%) for the same employee.
seed_data_creation: Used existing employee Olakunle Alonge (id: d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77). Employee has 10/20 requirements complete per /compliance-requirements endpoint.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Compliance System Audit complete. Key findings: 1) Compliance score is correctly calculated from requirement completion (not document count), 2) No duplicate forms exist after cleanup, 3) Forms and documents have requirement_id linking, 4) Compliance Summary card shows correct counts, 5) Minor inconsistency between /compliance (55%) and /compliance-requirements (50%) endpoints due to different training name matching logic. Employee Olakunle Alonge shows 10/20 requirements complete, 4 verified.
